name: Glazed Pork Chops (Scorpio)
recipeIngredient: 24 ounces pork loin chops (extra lean), butterflied (4 ounces per serving)
1 1/2 cups fat-free chicken broth, low salt
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, combine all the marinade ingredients. Add the pork chops and marinate at least 1 hour.
2. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Remove the pork chops from the marinade and reserve it.
3. Spray a nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray and place it over medium heat. Add the marinated pork chops and brown on all sides.
4. Place the browned chops in a baking dish and pour in the reserved marinade. Bake for 25 to 35 minutes, or until the chops are cooked thoroughly.
5. Remove from the oven and glaze each pork chop with 1/2 cup of the Honey-Dijon sauce.
6. To make the sauce: In a medium saucepan, combine the chicken stock, Dijon-style mustard, honey, shallots, and paprika. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
7. In a small bowl, dissolve the cornstarch in the white wine. Add to the sauce to thicken, then simmer another 5 minutes.
8. Makes 6 servings.
